title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: perl-DBD-MySQL bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for perl-DBD-MySQL is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: perl DBD SSL broken by current version of mariadb-connector-c
not being able to use TLS in perl-DBD-mysql

full_text:
An update for perl-DBD-MySQL is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
